reason: additive tuple stamp per spec §4.5; s2/s5 gold score-log expectation dicts regenerated (whole-dict assertEqual targets)

behavior_evidence.evidence: 45-game live ablation b1 vs baseline (paired seeds 1000-1044, n_valid 45/45 both arms; snapshots docs/harness/reviews/2026-06-11-baseline-prompt-v1-metrics.json + docs/harness/reviews/2026-06-11-b1-prompt-v2-metrics.json). Hallucination repair PASS: visual-halluc speech rate 12.4%->2.45% (target <5% met), mechanic-halluc game rate 11.1%->2.2% (no parroting inflation), visual game rate 35.6%->11.1%. Gameplay outcome FAIL/REGRESSED: wolf win 77.8%->93.3% (+15.6pp, opposite of target), day1 hit 42.2%->31.1%, day2 50%->28.6%, verify-wolf-followed 50%->30% (n=20), seer-survives-d1 73.3%->57.8%. Root cause (per-game rows): in 14/20 seer-checked-wolf games the day-1 majority voted out the TRUE SEER; the discrimination guidance armed wolf counter-claims while villagers lack a claim ledger to resolve them -> confirms the SYS-B4 gap (village cannot structurally use seer information).

verdict.next: SYS-B4 Claim Ledger + Vote Scaffold (input-side scaffold; action strict-JSON contract unchanged)

reason: SYS-B4 Claim Ledger + Vote Scaffold (scheme C scribe): per-round extraction artifact -> cross-round claim ledger -> digest into speeches, digest+comparison-program into vote requests only; restrained speech contract (graded guidance)
expected_change: v3 coexists with v1/v2 at runtime (arm-selected); v1/v2 goldens untouched; targets the b1 failure chain (village votes out its own seer in 70% of verify cases); action strict-JSON contract untouched (spec hard constraint)

behavior_evidence.evidence: 45-game live ablation b4 vs baseline/b1 (paired seeds 1000-1044; n_valid=40 — 1 low-live + 4 dropped by the scaffold_coverage<0.5 arm-purity gate, valid-game coverage mean 0.938; all 45 artifact sets pass invariants I1-I7+I4b; snapshot docs/harness/reviews/2026-06-11-b4-prompt-v3-metrics.json). Failure chain HALVED: seer-voted-out-in-verify-cases 70% (b1, 14/20) -> 35.3% (6/17; target <30% missed by one game); verify-wolf-followed 30% -> 52.9% (above baseline 50%); day2 hit 28.6% -> 45.5%; herding 0.678 -> 0.617. Hallucination repairs HELD: visual speech 2.47%, visual game 5.0%, mechanic game 5.0% (all within the <=5% no-regress gate). Wolf win 93.3% (b1) -> 87.5%, still above baseline 77.8% (directional gate <=65% NOT met): bottleneck moved — seer died in 33/40 games (15 night-killed + 20 voted), day1 hit stayed 32.5%; 2-wolf parity closes within the 3-round cap before village converts information. Points at Layer 3/4 (board structure / seer survival), not prompt tuning.

verdict.mechanism: PASS (claim ledger + vote scaffold demonstrably fixed the targeted failure chain)
verdict.gameplay_outcome: PARTIAL_PASS (failure chain halved; win-rate directional gate not met)
verdict.next: Layer 4 board structure (seer survival / board balance) — adjudicated 2026-06-11; NO further B4 prompt tuning

l4_guard_addendum.reason: L4 guard arm (spec 2026-06-11-l4-guard-arm): guard-board samples appended — board-conditional rules card (no-guard denial line replaced by protect rules incl. milk-pierce), board-conditional speech v3 anti-mechanic line, guard action prompt, guard night observation. All pre-existing sample hashes untouched (append-only); non-guard boards byte-identical (pinned by test_prompt_v2/test_prompt_v3_speech_guard + unchanged goldens).

behavior_evidence.evidence: 45-game live ablation l4_guard (prompt_v3 + rules_v1_2 + guard board, paired seeds 1000-1044; n_valid=44 — 0 low-live, 1 dropped by scaffold_coverage gate; all 45 artifact sets pass invariants I1-I7+I4b+I8a/I8b/I8c with ZERO violations; snapshot docs/harness/reviews/2026-06-11-l4-guard-prompt-v3-metrics.json). Wolf win 87.5% (b4) -> 68.2% (-19.3pp, first arm below the 77.8% baseline); all 5 primary criteria met: seer death 82.5% -> 56.8%, claim-to-night-survival 72.2% -> 77.8%, verify-wolf-followed 52.9% -> 64.7% (first past the 60% target), seer-voted-out-in-verify 35.3% -> 23.5%; hallucination gates held (speech 2.96%, mechanic-game 4.55%, board-aware word list). Strong-pass gate (<=65%) missed by 3.2pp. Bottleneck moved to milk-pierce: 12 nights lost to uncoordinated guard+witch double-protection (witch_save_rate 1.0, guard blocked 14 kills, guard-targets-seer only 17%). Verdict: ACCEPTABLE PROGRESS (2026-06-11-l4-guard-VERDICT.md); next arm = witch coordination guidance (prompt_v4 candidate), standard rules unchanged.

reason: l4_guard_witch_coord arm: witch antidote-coordination guidance injected into the witch's own night action observation on guard boards (spec 2026-06-12-l4-guard-witch-coord-arm-design; targets the L4 bottleneck of 12 milk-pierced nights from uncoordinated guard+witch double-protection)
expected_change: witch night observation gains the coordination suffix ONLY when board-has-guard AND victim present AND antidote unused; all other surfaces and states byte-identical to prompt_v3 (canary-pinned: standard board / no victim / spent antidote)

behavior_evidence.evidence: 45-game live ablation l4_guard_witch_coord vs l4_guard (seat-level TRUE pairing, same multiset + seed stream; n_valid=41 -- 1 fail-closed + 1 low-live + 2 scaffold_coverage drops; all 45 artifact sets pass invariants I1-I8c with ZERO violations; snapshot docs/harness/reviews/2026-06-12-l4-guard-witch-coord-prompt-v4-metrics.json). PRIMARY CRITERION FAILED CLEANLY: milk_pierce_death_count 12 -> 12 (target <=5), witch_save_rate 1.0 -> 1.0, witch_save_night1_share 1.0 -> 1.0. Injection chain verified working (45/45 night-1 witch requests carry the suffix, conditional gate correct on later rounds); the witch cites the milk-pierce risk in reason_summary and then saves anyway every game -- guidance read, rationalized away, behavior unchanged. Wolf win 68.2% -> 65.9% (0.85pp above the <=65% gate) NOT attributed to coordination (pierce count unchanged). Conclusion: input-side prompt guidance cannot fix the witch's mechanical night-1 save / milk-pierce leak. Loss taxonomy (offline): 90%+ of village losses end by round 2 in both arms (cap=4 has no constituency -- deferred on evidence).

verdict.next: do not iterate witch-coordination prompt; cap=4 stays backlog (loss taxonomy shows no round-cap constituency); remaining open lines = P8 witch-poison-zero, L3 night-1 position bias (user adjudicates next)
